recommendations.title: The Craft: Legacy
recommendations.overview: An eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

recommendations.title: The Abandoned
recommendations.overview: A troubled young woman who, in a last-ditch effort at getting her life together, takes a job working nights as a security guard at an abandoned luxury apartment building. Stuck with a brusque rent-a-cop as her partner, she tries to not let her mind p

recommendations.title: Werewolf
recommendations.overview: Summer of 1945. A temporary orphanage is established in an abandoned palace surrounded by forests for the eight children liberated from the Gross-Rosen camp. Hanka, also a former inmate, becomes their guardian. After the atrocities of the camp, the p

recommendations.title: Who Can Kill a Child?
recommendations.overview: A couple of English tourists arrive at the island of Almanzora, off the Spanish Mediterranean coast, where they discover that there are no adults in a small fishing village, only some children who stare at them and smile mysteriously.

recommendations.title: Away
recommendations.overview: After suffering a plane crash on a mysterious island, a young man embarks on an epic journey through forests, deserts and mountains trying to escape the shadow of a huge dark spirit.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: Finders Keepers
recommendations.overview: A haunted doll teaches one little girl why children shouldn't play with undead things.

recommendations.title: Beloved
recommendations.overview: After Paul D. finds his old slave friend Sethe in Ohio and moves in with her and her daughter Denver, a strange girl comes along by the name of "Beloved". Sethe and Denver take her in and then strange things start to happen...
